title: 0 Tick Utils
description: A client-side mod for the 0t cult server
body:
A small mod for the private 0 Tick Cult redstone server allowing for group chat usage and images in chat with the discord chat bridge.

For now, this mod is mainly for the server but in the future there might be some general features to help with making 0t contraptions amd redstone in general

Features:
- Chat Groups (separate tabs for group chat and main chat)
- Chat Bridge support (showing images in chat through the server chat bridge)
- And many more to come!
